description: Typology reference table. One row per typology. Stores client-customized product typology labels used to classify trades at a finer level than the standard Murex Family/Group/Type hierarchy. Unlike M_TRN_FMLY, M_TRN_GRP, and M_TRN_TYPE (which are standard Murex fields), typologies are defined and maintained by each client. Joined to TRN_HDR_DBF via TRN_HDR_DBF.M_TYPOLOGY = TYPOLOGY_DBF.M_REFERENCE.

fields.remark: Primary key. Join target from TRN_HDR_DBF.M_TYPOLOGY.
Human-readable label of the typology as configured by the client. Examples: 'Bond Return Swap', 'Commodity Swap', 'Interest Rate Swap', 'Cross Currency Swap'.
